meaning: n.衬背,援助,支持者,赞助者
examples: The police gave the proposals their full backing.
He has the backing of almost a quarter of the electorate.
The campaign has redoubled its efforts to win the backing of women.
We are not backing away from acquiring, but we are keeping our price discipline on acquisitions.
"I've never had their backing really but that isn't a problem, " he told BBC Radio Kent.
